summary: Iteration 186: Tested redesigned Product Detail Page (PDP) at /marketplace/{product_id}. All features working correctly - product image displays from image_url, price shows as TZS 8,000 per unit using base_price, sizes/colors/branding methods render with active states, quantity controls work with min_quantity enforcement, subtotal calculates correctly, gold Add to Cart button works, Bank Transfer Payment info visible (no Stripe), trust signals show 'Managed Delivery' and 'Quality Assured' (not 'Verified sourcing'), bulk CTA with Request Pricing and Talk to Sales buttons present. No vendor/marketplace/fulfillment partner language found. Mobile responsive.

success_rate.backend: 100% (API returns correct product data with base_price, image_url, sizes, colors, print_methods)

test_credentials: No login required - PDP is public
context_for_next_testing_agent: PDP redesign complete and working. Key data mapping: price uses base_price field (not customer_price), image uses image_url field. Product has sizes, colors (with hex codes), print_methods arrays. min_quantity=10 enforced in UI. Currency is TZS (Tanzanian Shillings).

price_display.details: Shows 'TZS 8,000 per unit' using base_price field

stock_indicator.details: Green checkmark with 'In Stock' text visible

size_selector.details: Pills rendered for S, M, L, XL, XXL with active state on selection

color_swatches.details: White, Black, Navy swatches with hex colors and selection indicator (checkmark)

branding_methods.details: Pills for Screen Print, DTG, Embroidery with active state

quantity_controls.details: Starts at min_quantity (10), increment/decrement work, min enforced (cannot go below 10)

add_to_cart_button.details: Gold button (#D4A843) with data-testid='add-to-cart-btn', shows toast on click

bank_transfer_payment.details: Bank Transfer Payment section visible, no Stripe references

trust_signals.details: 'Managed Delivery' and 'Quality Assured' present, NO 'Verified sourcing'

bulk_cta.details: 'Request Pricing' and 'Talk to Sales' buttons present

breadcrumb.details: Home > Products > Apparel > Classic Cotton T-Shirt

vendor_language_check.details: No vendor/marketplace partner/fulfillment partner/third-party seller language found

product_description.details: Product Description section renders below image

mobile_responsive.details: All sections visible and functional on mobile (390x844 viewport)
